title: CreatePackAdventuring
description: A Vanilla++ package based on Create and a bunch of exploration mods to encourage exploration.
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8957a3642c57bc028a8d0795180c7aec743faf6f.png)

----

This pack is made for people who like both adventuring and base building. I have taken combinations of mods that allow you to use all features from [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and use them in a large variety of mods such as [Farmers Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight), [Bosses of Mass Destruction](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction-forge) and even [Thirst Was Taken](https://modrinth.com/mod/thirst-was-taken) to name a few.

This pack is also very joke like and has some mods in it that are fun kind of mods like [[Let's Do] Brewery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-brewery) and [Broken Bad](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-broken-bad) so keep that in mind.😄

If you want to copy anything from this pack feel free, this is not a serious project!


## Important!!!

```
There are two files you can download. The first is for clients and second is for servers.
The files are seperated as I experienced servers crashing when playing on the clients file.
[name]-[version]_client.mrpack
[name]-[version]_host.mrpack
```
---
### Potential Issues:

-> You should also know that the config for the Voice Mod has been changed so it will use the default port for the server and not a second one. If your server is crashing this could be the issue. I would look into tutorials about the voice mod to fix the issue.
